title: Automated DNA Extraction from Sediment Samples and Filter Membranes Using Magnetic Beads
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4a8gd","text":"This method presents an optimized protocol for the automated extraction of sediment samples and filter membranes using magnetic beads. DNA was extracted and purified using MGIEasy Stool Microbiome DNA Extraction Kit (940-000122-00, MGI Tech) on a compatible automation system (MGISP-NE384, MGI Tech) .","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6b0tl","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9jug0","text":"MGIEasy Stool Microbiome DNA Extraction Kit (940-000122-00, MGI Tech)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bed7v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4olv6","text":"Supplies:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"65fhb","text":"Pipette tips (assorted volumes)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fk70n","text":"Tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"63uim","text":"96-well deep-well plates","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5juad","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"359b1","text":"Equipment:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6er12","text":"MGISP-NE384, MGI Tech","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6tpkr","text":"Micropipettes, various volumes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a7d0k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Use 1 g of each sediment sample or one half of each filter membrane.
Sediment samples were centrifuged in 96-well deep-well plates (3960, Corning) at 12.000 rpm, °C, for 00:05:00 before the extraction, and the supernatant was discarded before extraction.
Filter membranes were cut to small pieces and subjected to extraction directly.
For one reaction, every 20 µL Magnetic Beads-T are mixed with 300 µL PFB-M, and mix them thoroughly.

Take out 5 U-bottom deep-well plates (MGI, 1000004644), and mark them as 【PFBM + Magnetic beads-T】, 【PW1-M】, 【PW2】, and 【PB】respectively. Add reagents according to Table. Item Volume/Well 1 PFBM + Magnetic beads-T 320 μL (PFB-M + Magnetic beads-T mixed liquor) + 240 μL sample 2 PW1-M 400 μL 3 PW2 800 μL 4 PB 120 μL Input volume of PFB-M, PW1-M, PW2, Magnetic Beads-T, and PB
Select script provided by the supplier for DNA extraction.
The extracted DNA can be stored at -20 °C .
Follow the on-screen instructions to place the consumables, samples, and reagents. Confirm the placement and close the door.
creator: Qianyue Ji
